title: Lapis Armor
description: This Mod adds Lapis armour with a different recipe than you think
body:
**Lapis Armor**
=========================
This mod adds lapis armor to the game

**Lapis armour description**:
- Enchantibility: 25
  
  Info: Enchantibility means how common rare enchantments can be enchanted on this armor. The higher the enchantability, the better enchantments you will get when enchanting the armor.

  Leather armor: 15

  Chainmail armor: 12
  
  Iron armor: 9

  Gold armor: 25
  
  Diamond armor: 10

  Netherite armor: 15

- Knock back resistance: 0.1
  Info: Only Netherite has 0.1

Recipe:

- Helmet:
  - 4 Lapis lazulis
  - 1 Block of lapis lazuli
  
  ![Helmet](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7e445bf2d859de95c31b07a9fe4e834023c46a40.png)

- Chesplate:
  - 7 Lapis lazulis
  - 1 Block of lapis lazuli

  ![Chestplate](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e593513e3963c92cf4a6020e13333a949079e1a7.png)

- Leggings:
  - 6 Lapis lazulis
  - 1 Block of lapis lazuli

  ![Leggings](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/def7aa11a0da0d2e65106fc6111586c4753d9d7e.png)

- Boots:
  - 2 Lapis lazulis
  - 2 Block of lapis lazulis

  ![Boots](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0e0fda9b4829d339a16a5d74da7741498f14fa49.png)

  _**Note**_:

- The items in the recipe are the old textures
